description: Fix supernova streak to reset after 1 day of inactivity instead of sharing the burn streak's 7-day tolerance

userStories.title: Separate supernovaStreak from burnStreak with different gap tolerances
userStories.description: As a user, I want the supernova streak to reset to 0 when my buddy and I haven't worked out today or yesterday, while the burn streak keeps its lenient 7-day tolerance.
acceptanceCriteria: In services/api/src/services/streak-calculator.ts, extract the backward-walking loop into a helper function that accepts a maxGap parameter
calculateStreaks() calls the helper twice: once with maxGap=6 for burnStreak, once with maxGap=1 for supernovaStreak
burnStreak and supernovaStreak are returned as separate independently-calculated values
When the most recent group workout was 2+ days ago, supernovaStreak is 0
When the most recent group workout was 7+ days ago, burnStreak is 0
last7Days array is unchanged (factual workout history, not streak logic)
Update ALL existing tests in streak-calculator.test.ts so they assert separate burnStreak and supernovaStreak values where they previously assumed equality
All tests pass (cd services/api && yarn test)
userStories.notes: The core change: the current loop uses gapDays >= 7 for both streaks. Parameterize it so burnStreak uses gapDays >= 7 (max gap 6) and supernovaStreak uses gapDays >= 2 (max gap 1). Both burn-buddies and burn-squads endpoints call calculateStreaks(), so fixing the function fixes both.

userStories.title: Add edge-case tests for differentiated streak behavior
userStories.description: As a developer, I need comprehensive tests verifying that burnStreak and supernovaStreak diverge correctly at boundary conditions.
acceptanceCriteria: Test: workout only today → burnStreak=1, supernovaStreak=1
Test: workout only yesterday → burnStreak=1, supernovaStreak=1
Test: last workout 2 days ago → burnStreak=1, supernovaStreak=0
Test: last workout 6 days ago → burnStreak=1, supernovaStreak=0
Test: last workout 7 days ago → burnStreak=0, supernovaStreak=0
Test: workouts today and 3 days ago (2-day gap between them) → burnStreak=2, supernovaStreak=1
Test: workouts today and 2 days ago (1-day gap between them) → burnStreak=2, supernovaStreak=2
All tests pass (cd services/api && yarn test)
userStories.notes: Add these as a new describe block in streak-calculator.test.ts, e.g. 'supernova vs burn streak differentiation'. Use the existing makeGroupWorkout() helper and MS_PER_DAY constant from the test file.
